landing.heroSubtitle: Whether it's your first digital payment or your hundredth, Saathi guides you every step of the way.
landing.whySubtitle: A guided path from curiosity to confidence.
landing.step1Desc: A warm welcome in your language.
landing.step2Desc: Understand banking, one concept at a time.
landing.step5Desc: Recognize scams before they reach you.
landing.t1Text: I sent money to my son for the first time. Saathi made it feel easy.
landing.t2Text: The safety tips saved me from a fake OTP call.
landing.t3Text: Voice guidance in Tamil helped me learn UPI without fear.
landing.illustrationAlt: A village family using a phone together with Saathi

onboarding.askLanguage: Which language makes you feel at home?
onboarding.greeting: Hello! I'm Saathi. Banking can feel confusing at first—but you're not alone. I'll guide you, one step at a time.

language.title: Choose your language
language.subtitle: You can change this anytime in Settings.

dashboard.tipText: Never share your OTP with anyone — not even bank staff.

transfer.title: Send Money
transfer.enterAmount: How much do you want to send?
transfer.successDesc: Saathi guided you through every step. Well done.

upi.title: UPI
upi.desc: Pay anyone instantly using a UPI ID or QR code.

atm.title: ATM
atm.desc: Withdraw cash safely using your card and PIN.

pin.title: PIN
pin.desc: A secret number that protects your card and account.

otp.title: OTP
otp.desc: A one-time code. Never share it with anyone.

interest.title: Interest
interest.desc: Extra money your savings can earn over time.

loan.title: Loan
loan.desc: Borrowing money and paying it back with care.

insurance.title: Insurance
insurance.desc: Protection for you and your family when life surprises you.

fakeCalls.title: Fake Calls
fakeCalls.story: Someone calls claiming to be from your bank and asks for your card details.
fakeCalls.action: Hang up. Call your bank using the number on your card or passbook.

otpScam.title: OTP Scam
otpScam.story: A stranger asks you to share the OTP that just arrived on your phone.
otpScam.action: Never share OTP. Banks never ask for it over phone or message.

qrScam.title: QR Scam
qrScam.story: Someone asks you to scan their QR to 'receive' money.
qrScam.action: Only scan QR codes when you are paying. Receiving money does not need your scan.

lotteryScam.title: Lottery Scam
lotteryScam.story: A message says you won a prize and need to pay a fee to claim it.
lotteryScam.action: Ignore and delete. Real prizes never ask you to pay first.

voice.title: Voice Assistant
voice.subtitle: Talk to Saathi. Hands-free help.
voice.hint: Try: "Check my balance" or "How do I stay safe?"

help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: We're here when you need us.
help.faq1a: Saathi is a companion that helps you learn and practice banking safely. Connect your real bank separately.
help.faq2a: Yes. Open Settings anytime and pick a new language.
help.faq3q: What if I make a mistake sending money?
help.faq3a: Always confirm the name and amount. If something goes wrong, contact your bank immediately.

auth.name: Full Name
auth.enterDetails: Enter your email or phone number to recover your password
auth.userNotFound: User not found. Please sign up.

footer.rights: Made with care for first-time digital users.
